blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt 90 minutes from Norwegian football immortality at San Siro
A 3-1 lead from Bodø is a luxury — but San Siro tests every nerve. A draw sends the Arctic club to the CL quarter-finals. Norwegian football's biggest night is 24 hours away.

blocks.label: ⚽ Tuesday & Wednesday second legs
items: ⚽ Tue 18:45 — Club Brugge vs Atlético Madrid — all square, must-win for Atlético at home
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Olympiacos vs Bayer Leverkusen — Leverkusen heavy favourites at the BayArena
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Monaco vs PSG — PSG lead 3-2, French derby decider on a knife's edge
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Benfica vs Real Madrid — Benfica need to overturn Madrid's slim advantage
